summary: Frontend testing of redesigned AdminQuestions.js completed. All 10 test scenarios passed. The new design shows courses first as cards, then navigates to chapter-organized questions with statistics. AI generator has two tabs (Desde Tema/Prompt and Desde Documento PDF). Question editor includes chapter, lesson, and difficulty selectors.

issues: Minor: Chapters show 0 preguntas while total shows 9 - existing questions may not have chapter_id assigned

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components - accessibility concern
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing data (1 course: Cálculo Diferencial, 2 chapters: Límites/Derivadas)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminQuestions redesign fully tested. CourseSelector shows courses as cards with question counts. QuestionManager shows stats and expandable chapters. AI Generator has prompt and PDF tabs. Question editor has all required fields.

test2_course_list.details: Preguntas page shows 'Banco de Preguntas' with course cards. Cálculo Diferencial card shows 'Intermedio' badge and '9 preguntas'

test3_gestionar_preguntas.details: Clicking 'Gestionar Preguntas' navigates to Question Manager view with course title and 'Volver' button

test4_statistics.details: Statistics cards show: 9 Total Preguntas, 4 Fáciles, 4 Medias, 1 Difíciles

test5_expandable_chapters.details: Chapters 'Límites' and 'Derivadas' are visible and expandable with question counts

test6_generar_con_ia_dialog.details: 'Generar con IA' button opens dialog with title 'Generar Preguntas con IA'

test7_generator_tabs.details: Generator dialog has two tabs: 'Desde Tema/Prompt' and 'Desde Documento PDF'

test8_chapter_selector_generator.details: Generator has chapter selector (Capítulo *), lesson selector (Lección opcional), difficulty selector (Dificultad)

test9_nueva_pregunta_dialog.details: 'Nueva Pregunta' button opens editor dialog with title 'Nueva Pregunta'

test10_editor_selectors.details: Editor has Capítulo*, Lección (opcional), Dificultad selectors, Enunciado textarea, Options A-D, Explicación, Vista Previa

course_selector_view.course_card: PRESENT - shows course title, level badge, question count, 'Gestionar Preguntas' button

question_manager_view.stats_cards: 4 cards showing Total, Fáciles, Medias, Difíciles counts
question_manager_view.chapter_sections: Expandable cards with chapter titles, question counts, '+Añadir' buttons

generator_dialog.tabs: Desde Tema/Prompt (with topic textarea) and Desde Documento PDF (with upload area)
generator_dialog.common_fields: Capítulo*, Lección (opcional), Dificultad, Número de preguntas selectors

question_editor_dialog.enunciado: Textarea with Markdown+LaTeX support, Imagen button
question_editor_dialog.options: A, B, C, D with radio buttons to mark correct answer
question_editor_dialog.preview: Vista Previa section for live preview

design_verification.course_cards: Clean card design with level badge, description, question count
design_verification.stats_cards: Color-coded numbers (primary, green, yellow, red) with labels
design_verification.chapter_expandable: Chevron icons for expand/collapse, question counts in badges
design_verification.dialogs: Well-structured with clear sections and responsive layout
